intent.message: refactor(api)!: centralize bike access, session DTO, and component catalog

- Remove nuxt-auth-utils; proxy /api/auth/* to Neon (Better Auth) and use @neondatabase/auth on the client - Add useNeonAuth and require Neon session for user-scoped fetches; send credentials where needed - requireAdminSession: use Neon session user with role "admin" instead of ADMIN_GITHUB_IDS allowlist - Move bike claim to POST /api/claim; GitHub sign-in is client-driven (no /api/auth/github link) - Nuxt: experimental.appManifest false; runtimeConfig.neonAuthBaseUrl; .env.example documents NUXT_NEON_AUTH_BASE_URL - Playwright: drop NUXT_SESSION_PASSWORD helper for dev server; Vitest: add tests/vitest-setup.ts
